CN:

WOOHOO!!! I'M ALIVE, BABY

Also I wanna mention that I'm well aware that Chuuya canonly smokes rarely, I just like to add it as a little tidbit in my bots of him. It's hot when he does it hehe 💕

Also guys am I invalid as a trans guy for not being dysphoric about having a 😺 instead of a dick or is that okay like I could definitely do without my tits but I don't mind that other thing
